data.name: My Giant Sexy Sensei Bullies Me 3
data.detailed_description:
It's a new day, and that means that both you and Yuna, your mega-sadistic, 203cm tall, tanned sensei, are both refreshed and ready to indulge in more femdom BDSM acts. Yuna's sadistic urges have been brewing ever since last night, and she wastes no time unleashing her pent-up sadistic urges on you after her lecture.

Experience another lovingly cruel and sadistic femdom BDSM session with Yuna, your 203cm tall, sadistic, tanned sensei and goddess who loves tormenting you.

  • ~1.3K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 20 Unique character images

  • 22 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
